Bash(git -C "D:\\deskmate\\deskmate\\my-neuro-main" commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Fix conversation history panel with simplified implementation

- Rewrote conversation history using simple HTML/JS approach
- Removed complex module dependencies, use global window functions
- Added mouseenter/mouseleave events for panel and toggle button
- Fixed llm-handler to call window.addAIMessage directly
- Panel toggles correctly with the 💬 button
- Messages display with timestamps and color-coded by sender

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git -C "D:\\deskmate\\deskmate\\my-neuro-main" commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Fix mouse event handling for conversation history panel

- Update containsPoint in model-interaction.js to include history panel and button
- Modify setupMouseIgnore to check interactive elements before setting ignore state
- Prevents mouse events from being blocked on history panel and toggle button
- Fixes click interaction issues with conversation history feature

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git -C "D:\\deskmate\\deskmate\\my-neuro-main" commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''

Bash(git -C "D:\\deskmate\\deskmate\\my-neuro-main" commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''

Bash(git -C "D:\\deskmate\\deskmate\\my-neuro-main" commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
==================================================
      大版本定档 v1.0 - Conversation History Edition
==================================================

核心功能:
-----------
✅ Live2D 桌宠显示和交互
✅ 语音识别 \(ASR\) - 支持中英文
✅ 语音合成 \(TTS\) - AI 对话语音播放
✅ LLM 对话 - 支持多模型 \(GLM, Gemini, SiliconFlow等\)
✅ 工具调用系统 - 截图、时间、天气等
✅ 游戏模式集成
✅ 弹幕系统
✅ 记忆管理 \(MemoryManager + MemOS\)
✅ 视觉功能 - 截图分析

新增功能 \(v1.0\):
-----------
✅ 对话历史记录面板
   - 点击 💬 按钮切换显示/隐藏
   - 用户消息蓝色边框，AI消息粉色边框
   - 带时间戳，可滚动
   - 鼠标交互修复

移除功能:
-----------
❌ 逐字浮现字幕 - 已移除，仅保留对话历史面板

配置文件:
-----------
- live-2d/config.json - 主配置文件

技术栈:
-----------
- Electron + Live2D + PIXI.js
- Node.js 后端
- 多 LLM API 支持

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git -C "D:\\deskmate\\deskmate\\my-neuro-main" commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add draggable support for chat history panel

- Enable dragging by clicking on .chat-header area
- Add cursor: move style to indicate draggable area
- Update mousemove handler to support history panel dragging
- Chat container was already draggable, now history panel too

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git -C "D:\\deskmate\\deskmate\\my-neuro-main" commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Fix drag-drop: enable mouse events during drag

The issue was setIgnoreMouseEvents\(true\) was blocking all mouse events,
including drag-drop. Now we temporarily disable mouse ignore when
dragging starts.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git -C "D:\\deskmate\\deskmate\\my-neuro-main" commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add support for more file types \(Excel, Word, PPT, PDF, etc.\)

- Add isDocumentFile\(\) to detect document formats
- Support Excel \(.xls, .xlsx, .xlsm\)
- Support Word \(.doc, .docx, .docm\)
- Support PowerPoint \(.ppt, .pptx, .pptm\)
- Support PDF \(.pdf\)
- Add getDocumentType\(\) for friendly type names
- Add handleDocumentDrop\(\) for document files
- Update showUnsupportedMessage\(\) with new supported types

Note: Binary documents cannot be directly read, AI will ask user to
copy-paste content or describe what they want to know.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git -C "D:\\deskmate\\deskmate\\my-neuro-main" commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Fix TTS audio file path issue

- Add fix_audio.bat to rename URL-encoded audio file
- Update Azuma_TTS.bat to use simple "reference.wav" filename
- The URL-encoded filename caused FileNotFoundError

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git -C "D:\\deskmate\\deskmate\\my-neuro-main" commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Fix TTS request parameters for GPT-SoVITS API

The TTS request was missing required parameters:
- refer_wav_path, prompt_text, prompt_language were empty
- GPT-SoVITS API will use default values when these are empty
- Added debug logging for TTS requests and responses

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

chcp 65001
set "RUNTIME=D:\\deskmate\\deskmate\\my-neuro-main\\full-hub\\tts-hub\\GPT-SoVITS-Bundle\\runtime"
set "GPT_DIR=D:\\deskmate\\deskmate\\my-neuro-main\\full-hub\\tts-hub\\GPT-SoVITS-Bundle"
set "VOICE_DIR=D:\\deskmate\\deskmate\\my-neuro-main\\live-2d\\Voice_Model_Factory"
cd /d "%GPT_DIR%"
"%RUNTIME%\\python.exe" api.py -p 5000 -d cuda -s "%VOICE_DIR%\\azuma_e8_s2928.pth" -dr "%VOICE_DIR%\\reference.wav" -dt "我是今年大一新生女孩子。" -dl zh
pause
EOF)

Bash("D:\\deskmate\\deskmate\\my-neuro-main\\full-hub\\tts-hub\\GPT-SoVITS-Bundle\\runtime\\python.exe" -c "
import wave

print\(''=== 原来的 neuro 参考音频 ===''\)
with wave.open\(r''D:\\deskmate\\deskmate\\my-neuro-main\\full-hub\\tts-hub\\GPT-SoVITS-Bundle\\role_voice_api\\neuro\\01.wav'', ''rb''\) as f:
    print\(f''时长: {f.getnframes\(\) / f.getframerate\(\):.2f} 秒''\)
    print\(f''采样率: {f.getframerate\(\)} Hz''\)
    print\(f''声道: {f.getnchannels\(\)}''\)

print\(''''\)
print\(''=== Azuma 参考音频 ===''\)
with wave.open\(r''D:\\deskmate\\deskmate\\my-neuro-main\\live-2d\\Voice_Model_Factory\\reference.wav'', ''rb''\) as f:
    print\(f''时长: {f.getnframes\(\) / f.getframerate\(\):.2f} 秒''\)
    print\(f''采样率: {f.getframerate\(\)} Hz''\)
    print\(f''声道: {f.getnchannels\(\)}''\)
")
